description_long: This is a large, blue cab-over-engine truck designed for hauling long logs, as evidenced by the stacked cylindrical wooden logs secured on its extended flatbed trailer. The truck features a robust front grille, side mirrors, and a set of six wheels on the trailer and two on the cab, indicating its heavy-duty nature. The flatbed is equipped with vertical metal stakes along the sides to keep the logs in place during transport. The cab is painted a light blue, contrasting with the dark flatbed and brown logs. The vehicle appears to be constructed primarily from metal, with glass windows and rubber tires, and the logs are made of wood. This type of truck is commonly seen in urban and rural environments, transporting timber to construction sites or lumber yards.
description: A large blue flatbed truck loaded with long brown logs, featuring a robust cab and multiple axles for heavy-duty hauling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue cab, grille, windshield, and the ends of the logs stacked on the flatbed.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the truck, the stacked logs, and the multiple axles and wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the cut ends of the logs and the back of the flatbed trailer.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the blue cab, flatbed, and the arrangement of logs and support stakes.
